interactive_prompts.name: auth_required
interactive_prompts.regex: ollama signin|sign in to ollama|authentication required|unauthorized
interactive_prompts.note: Cloud :cloud-suffixed models require OLLAMA_API_KEY or a prior `ollama signin`; local tags need no auth

interactive_prompts.name: model_not_found
interactive_prompts.regex: model.*not found|pull the model first|no such file or directory.*model
interactive_prompts.note: Operator must `ollama pull <model>` (local) or check the cloud model tag spelling

note: Local-or-cloud ollama via tmux REPL. Cloud routing is by MODEL TAG: `gpt-oss:120b-cloud` transparently hits ollama.com (needs OLLAMA_API_KEY / `ollama signin`); bare tags (`qwen3:30b`, `gemma4:26b`, ...) run on local hardware via the same daemon. OLLAMA_HOST selects WHICH `ollama serve` instance the CLI talks to (default 127.0.0.1:11434) — NOT cloud routing. Reasoning/review phases only — plain `ollama run` has no agentic tool-use (no Bash/Edit/Write), so source-writing phase assignment is rejected at Launch. model_tier_map defaults to the qwen3 family per the May 2026 ollama coding-agent rankings (fast→qwen3:7b for quick tasks, balanced→qwen3:30b for general work, deep→qwen3-coder:30b RL-trained on SWE-Bench); operators override via the per-phase EVOLVE_<AGENT>_MODEL or by `ollama pull`ing a different default. Cloud cannot do `format: {schema}` structured output — pin local tags for schema-bound phases. See knowledge-base/research/ollama-control-surface-2026.md + cycle-124 followup research dossier.
